instruction: Please update the priority on the Harborlight Gallery email about the Cambridge spring exhibitions preview that's in my inbox.

rule_ref.rule_text: For arts newsletters and gallery announcements, she prefers marking them low priority rather than leaving them at a normal inbox level.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: I keep arts newsletters in my inbox ecosystem, but I mark them low priority.

attributes.subject: Cambridge spring exhibitions preview and opening night details
attributes.body: A preview of the upcoming spring exhibitions, artist talks, and opening reception schedule at Harborlight Gallery in Cambridge.

attributes.subject: Member Thursday tickets and April program highlights
attributes.body: Reserve tickets for Member Thursday and browse upcoming talks, films, and gallery programs across the museum.

attributes.subject: Weekend open studio map and participating artists
attributes.body: Here is the updated studio map and the list of participating artists for this weekend's open studio event.

attributes.subject: Updated headcount for the benefits orientation
attributes.body: I've attached the revised attendee count and room setup notes for tomorrow's benefits orientation.
